campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 19, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, where they discussed staffing vacancies and efforts to recruit and retain employees. The council also addressed public comments on various matters and noted that the Boogie Festival is happening this weekend.
keyTopics: Staffing vacancies and recruitment/retention strategies
Public hearing on government code compliance
Boogie Festival this weekend
Public comment period on council matters

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — June 3, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council met to decide which sheriff service options to choose for the next fiscal year. The council needed to pick from different service level proposals and then provide direction on the city's sheriff services approach going forward.
keyTopics: Selecting sheriff service level options for FY 2026
Evaluating different service proposals from the Sheriff's office
Determining the city's near-term sheriff services strategy

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — June 16, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on June 16, 2026, to approve meeting minutes from earlier in June and authorize the Town Manager to sign several agreements and amendments related to software services, legal contracts, and litigation support. The council also adopted a resolution, though the full title was cut off in the agenda.
keyTopics: Approved minutes from June 2 and June 8 meetings
Authorized software services agreement (five-year term)
Updated legal services contracts with amendments
Authorized new litigation legal services agreement

san-jose.title: San José City Council — June 17, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to organize upcoming business, including finalizing the agenda for their June 23rd meeting and reviewing public records from early June. The council approved spending city funds and accepting donations for San José's participation in the Annual Rose, White & Blue Parade and Festival.
keyTopics: Finalized June 23, 2026 City Council agenda with new items and time assignments
Approved city funding and donations for Rose, White & Blue Parade and Festival participation
Reviewed public records from June 4-11, 2026

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — June 23, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met to address budget and infrastructure priorities for the coming year, including a new capital improvement program and updates to water management plans. The council also honored local institutions and a city official's judicial appointment, while meeting privately with legal counsel regarding two pending lawsuits.
keyTopics: Two pending litigation cases requiring legal counsel discussion
Fiscal Year 2026-27 budget appropriations and capital improvement projects
Water management plan updates and drought contingency strategies
Public Safety Building and Shoreline Golf Links parking lot repaving projects
South Bay Salt Pond Restoration initiative

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — June 23, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a special closed-session meeting on June 23, 2026, followed by a regular council meeting at 7 P.M. The closed session portion means the discussions were not open to the public, which typically happens for sensitive personnel, legal, or real estate matters.
keyTopics: Closed session meeting held
Regular council meeting convened at 7 P.M.
Flag salute and public meeting procedures

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — June 16, 2026
cupertino.summary: The City Council held a study session to review how Cupertino's zoning rules currently protect parks and recreational areas, and whether any corrections or updates are needed to comply with state law. The meeting also included a public comment period where residents could address the council on non-agenda topics.
keyTopics: Review of zoning designations for parks and recreational facilities
Corrections needed to align local rules with state law protections
Parkland site protections and oversight

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — June 30, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara City Council held a meeting on June 30, 2026, using both in-person and remote participation options. Residents can join via Zoom or phone and submit written comments online through the city's agenda portal.
keyTopics: Hybrid meeting format available (in-person and Zoom)
Remote participation options via Zoom or phone
Written public comment submission through eComment system
City Council meeting access at legistar.com agenda page

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — June 16, 2026
milpitas.summary: Milpitas City Council met to approve funding plans for community development and housing projects, along with a new crime prevention program for local storefronts. The council also reviewed meeting procedures and upcoming agenda items.
keyTopics: Approved 2026-2027 budget and Community Development Block Grant funding
Approved new development permit and housing map for a specific site project
Launched Storefront Crime Prevention Program to improve downtown safety
Reviewed and approved previous meeting minutes and next meeting schedule

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — June 23, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council met to approve turning part of the Measure E development site into public parkland and reviewed plans to expand the driving range at Baylands Golf Links. The council also received updates from various city departments and committee liaisons.
keyTopics: Park Dedication Ordinance for Measure E site
Baylands Golf Links driving range expansion feasibility
Department reports and liaison updates
